name: callabo-cli
description: Use Callabo records, labels, transcripts, dialogs, insights, uploads, and downloads through the local callabo CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Callabo records through the local callabo CLI.
interface.longDescription: Callabo CLI helps Codex use the local callabo executable for workspace labels, records, transcripts, dialogs, insights, uploads, downloads, and authentication troubleshooting.
defaultPrompt: Find the latest Callabo record for this topic.
Summarize insights from a Callabo meeting.
Show labels and search Callabo records.
